description: Leartech preset for .NET services. Layer on top of default.json — adds groups for the leartech-dotnet-runtime base image and the internal Leartech.* NuGet packages (auto-generated SDK clients + leartech-dotnet-common modules).

packageRules.description: Auto-merge leartech-dotnet-runtime image bumps as soon as they land. 'at any time' overrides default Monday-only schedule — internal lib, low risk, but consumers can be blocked on it (e.g. fleet .NET 9 → 10 bump).

Auto-merge internal Leartech.* NuGet packages as soon as they land. Covers leartech-dotnet-common modules (Leartech.Auth, Leartech.Logging, Leartech.Config) plus auto-generated SDK clients (Leartech.<ServiceName>.Client). 'at any time' overrides default Monday-only schedule because internal libs may need to flow within hours.
